notableEvents.label: William Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras grounds into a double play, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Brice Turang out at 2nd. William Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brice Turang GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brice Turang grounds into a double play, first baseman Spencer Torkelson to catcher Dillon Dingler to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Joey Ortiz out at home. Brice Turang out at 1st.
